title: Barenth
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Barenth-EGTW.png]] |name=Barenth |region=*[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Barenth system/Legends|Barenth system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square K-8 as part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Drannik sector/Legends|Drannik sector]]. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' designates the Expansion Region section of that grid square as part of the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]]. In addition, {{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-expansion-region|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Expansion Region}} places the Drannik [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the portion of the Expansion Region between the [[Mondress sector/Legends|Mondress]] and [[Lostar sector/Legends|Lostar sectors]]. ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' establishes both Mondress and Lostar sectors to be a part of the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]], which the [[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]] further defines as a sub-region located in the northern section of the Expansion Region. Therefore, Barenth must also be a part of the Outer Expansion Zone. **[[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]] *[[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] |sector=[[Drannik sector/Legends|Drannik sector]] |system=[[Barenth system/Legends|Barenth system]] |coordinates=K-8''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Barenth system/Legends|Barenth system]] |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Ancient laboratory]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-4-the-rise-of-the-republic-needs-author-entry|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 4: The Rise of the Republic}} *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' }} {{Quote|In the following passage, a Ho'Din named Baji ''[…]'' describes his unique cultural reaction to an ecological disaster on a world called Barenth—a place he had visited to research healing remedies.|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species''|}} '''Barenth''' was an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Drannik sector/Legends|Drannik sector]]. During the [[Waymancy Storm]] of [[7811 BBY]], its civilian population saw a near complete evacuation by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as part of the [[Defense of Barenth|defense]] of the world against the [[Signatories of Waymancy]], with the Republic losing an entire [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] during the effort. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later, the [[Ho'Din]] [[Baji]] visited an [[ancient laboratory]] on Barenth while an [[Barenth ecological disaster|ecological disaster]] was occurring there. The healer eventually resolved to take up permanent residence at the ruins of the [[Laboratory/Legends|laboratory]] to attempt to reverse the effects of the disaster there. ==Description== Barenth was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Barenth system/Legends|Barenth system]]. It was a part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Drannik sector/Legends|Drannik sector]], being located both in the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]] sub-region and the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of that region. ==History== {{Quote|The ancient laboratory around me crumbled
The ground shook and the buildings tumbled. ''[…]''
Later I returned for an investigation
And found the grounds and plants filled with radiant contamination.|A passage by Baji included in ''The Essential Guide to Alien Species''|}} During the [[Waymancy Storm]] of [[7811 BBY]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] mounted a [[Defense of Barenth|defense]] of Barenth against its enemy, the [[Signatories of Waymancy]]. During the engagement, almost the entire civilian population of the world was evacuated, although the effort cost the Republic an entire [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]]. At a speech delivered on the [[25th anniversary of Victory in the Waymancy Storm]] in [[7786 BBY]], the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Nagratha]] noted the defense of Barenth as one of the [[Blood/Legends|bloodiest]] events of the Waymancy Storm. [[File:Baji.png|thumb|right|200px|The Ho'Din Baji resolved to take up permanent residence on Barenth.]] Barenth fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the reign of that government, an [[ancient laboratory]] consisting of multiple buildings and containing unique specimens of [[Barenth healing plant|plants]] and [[Seed/Legends|seeds]] was located on Barenth. During that time, the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] healer [[Baji]] visited the [[Laboratory/Legends|laboratory]] with the intent of researching healing remedies. Baji's visit to the Barenth facility coincided with an [[Barenth ecological disaster|ecological disaster]] on the world, with a [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquake]] damaging the laboratory. During the quake, Baji quickly obtained the [[Plant/Legends|plants]] and seeds necessary for his research and left the facility. Upon his return to investigate the laboratory, the Ho'Din discovered that the facility grounds and plants located there had been tainted by a radiant contamination. Due to his sympathy for the damaged plants—and the [[Species/Legends|species]]-wide veneration the Ho'Din exhibited for plants—Baji resolved to inhabit the Barenth laboratory for the rest of his life in order to attempt to heal the plants therein. Baji's visit to Barenth was later noted in the [[Book/Legends|book]] ''[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'', which was based on the notes of [[Senior Anthropologist]] [[Mammon Hoole]]. ==Inhabitants== {{Quote|The Republic defense of Barenth allowed a near-complete civilian evacuation at the cost of an entire battle group and its personnel, who never flinched in the face of their duty.|Supreme Chancellor Nagratha|}} Barenth was home to a civilian population aligned with the Galactic Republic. During the Waymancy Storm, the Republic largely evacuated the civilians from the world. When the Ho'Din Baji visited Barenth by the time of the reign of the New Republic, he resolved to take up permanent residence there. ==Behind the scenes== Barenth was introduced in the [[2001]] reference book [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] by [[Ann Margaret Lewis (real person)|Ann Margaret Lewis]]. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Barenth [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square K-8. ==Sources== *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] {{1stm}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-4-the-rise-of-the-republic-needs-author-entry|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 4: The Rise of the Republic}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Barenth}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Drannik sector locations]] [[Category:Galactic Republic planets]] [[Category:New Republic planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Expansion Region]] [[Category:Planets in the Northern Dependencies]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
